features_used: Vmpp, Impp, Pmpp, Isc, Voc, FF, Rsh, Rs, NRMSE_Isc, R2_Voc, V_ini, I_ini, G_spec_int, APE, G_tilt20_start, G_tilt20_end, G_tilt15_start, G_tilt15_end, G_horiz_start, G_horiz_end, G_east_start, G_east_end, G_west_start, G_west_end, G_refl_start, G_refl_end, module_temperature_center, module_temperature_lateral, air_temperature, relative_humidity, air_density, abs_pressure, wind_speed_ms, wind_direction
note: Choisi comme modele de production actif malgre un RMSE legerement superieur au LSTM (41.3 vs 40.9) : MAE, MAPE et precision a +/-10W nettement meilleurs, et pas de fenetre sequentielle figee (prediction directe a partir des conditions meteo/horaires du point vise, donc pas de valeurs repetitives).
